author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Split init.rs (2855 LOC) into init/ directory module (1696 LOC mod.rs + 4 submodules). Extracted: python.rs (186 LOC — Python detection, cpitd install), signing.rs (87 LOC — driver SSH key setup), merge.rs (233 LOC — gitignore/MCP/settings merge), walkthrough.rs (697 LOC — TUI walkthrough app + draw functions). Fixed residual LocksFile HashMap<i64> references in agents_tab.rs and locks_cmd.rs. Binary builds clean, all 1665 tests pass.
